Now they don't even reply to emails. I lost 75 dollars for nothing. I ordered August 2025. Now it's January 2026 and still nothing from the tracking number they provided. I called china post and they said they have not received any package for that tracking or have not received any items to be delivered to my address. 

So disappointed.  Do not use this service.

Iâ€™m absolutely furious and disgusted at how Shopee has handled my return. I scheduled a return for a heavy chair on 30th July 2025 for pickup on the 1st August 2025. â€¨â€¨

After some back and forth, the agent suggested that I rescheduled, so I followed their advice. I generated a new tracking number on the 4th of August 2025 at 6PM-ish.â€¨â€¨Then the next morning at around 11AM, I get an update in the app saying:â€¨â€¨

â€œMultiple failed attempts have been made to pick up your item. Pickups will no longer be made.â€â€¨â€¨

This is an outright lie. Nobody came. Nobody attempted. I was home the entire time. I didnâ€™t miss a single doorbell ring, or I didnâ€™t even get a call or a Whatsapp message because there werenâ€™t any. â€¨â€¨

Shopee Logistics falsified service records to make it look like they tried and failed, just so they could wash their hands clean off the pickup. That is dishonest, manipulative, and frankly, a disgusting way to treat customers. â€¨â€¨I contacted customer service again. This time, the condescendingly told me to ensure that this event should not be "repeated in the futureâ€™. What do you mean "should not be repeated in the future" ??? Shouldnâ€™t YOU be the one who shouldnâ€™t be repeating this in the future?!???????? I sat at home for five whole days waiting for you and in the end what did you do?! â€¨â€¨This is a complete disgusting display of failed service, failed due diligence, false reporting of service records, and complete disregard for customer time and responsibility. Falsifying pickup status on the Shopee app is a serious breach. Do you understand that it isnâ€™t just bad service, but it is fraudulent behavior?! Absolutely vile.

STAY AWAY FROM SHOPEE!!! .

If Amazon comes in to Shopee's territory they can easily take over the $10 Billion sales.
Because everyone is fed up with Shopee and their customers will switch in a heartbeat.

SHOPEE will not be able to fix their system on short notice if competition comes in on the arena. It's so riddled with issues

Review:
They have different websites for each country and you cannot use the same email to authorise on different countries websites! So if you travel across Southest Asia, you need one email for Malaysia, one for Thailand, etc! 

As well as you cannot install mobile apps for Thai Shopee, if you're AppStore account isn't in Thailand. Extremely bad approach. On Lazada it's possible just to switch from one country to another.

Aside from that, many good products with reasonable prices are available there.
Translated_Review:
They have different websites for each country and you cannot use the same email to authorise on different countries websites! So if you travel across Southest Asia, you need one email for Malaysia, one for Thailand, etc! 

As well as you cannot install mobile apps for Thai Shopee, if you're AppStore account isn't in Thailand. Extremely bad approach. On Lazada it's possible just to switch from one country to another.

Aside from that, many good products with reasonable prices are available there.

Review:
Licenced Loan Shark Shopee is my story.
I have been a long time buyer ever since Covid days. Then they have this instalment payments with zero interest, which I utilise as its gonna be the same price. After that I think introduce the 14 days free return, not sure which come first. 
Anyway, the most recent case was when i bought the RM900 beauty products which i realised its not as per in the photo, i returned immediately on the same day thinking i am in safe hands. Shopee took like 2 weeks to review and suddenly just send back to me and said its rejected. I have to keep texting as there is NO bloody number to call. 
Then the agent suggests to send back again and i wrote to the seller and they said its Shoppâ€™s decision not theirs. Who is telling the truth i dont know. 
As my product is in 3 months instalment, I paid the first two months and then I forgot the 3rd month. Oh my Gawd, they call non stop , like 20 times per day,  as if i owe them 3 million. Now i fully understand how those loan sharks act and Shopee is a licenced LOAN SHARK. 
They can reject when you return goods even they claim its 14 days free return and then chase you like crazy. Shopee must be giving a lot of job opportunities to telemarketers and debt collectors. Big companies can do what they want and we consumers are just nothing to them.

Review:
I am writing to express my frustrationâ€¦
I am writing to express my frustration regarding the recent banning of my Shopee account, which I have been unable to resolve despite numerous attempts to contact your customer service team. My account has been banned, and I have not received any clear explanation for this action. In addition, I have been waiting for almost five days for a response to my concern, even though I was initially told I would receive feedback within 24-28 hours.

I have tried reaching out to your support team several times through both email and the live chat feature, but I am either left waiting or receive no meaningful response. As a result, I am left in the dark about the status of my account and orders. The inability to access my account is causing significant issues, especially because I cannot track my orders or view any important information related to past purchases.

Furthermore, all of my account details were verified, and I have ensured that I followed Shopee's guidelines. This makes it even more confusing why my account was banned without any notification or detailed explanation. I believe I should be given proper communication and a clearer understanding of what is happening with my account.

I am kindly requesting a clear explanation of why my account was banned, immediate access to my account so that I can track my orders, and an urgent response from your customer support team within 24 hours. I also request better communication from Shopee in terms of providing updates regarding my account status.

I have attached relevant evidence, including screenshots of emails and chat logs, to support my case. I hope that this matter will be taken seriously and resolved promptly.

Thank you for your attention to this issue. I look forward to your immediate response.

Review: I purchased the product on the 10th, received it on the 12th, tried it on the 13th but couldn't use it due to network problems, clicked the return button on the 14th, mailed it back to the merchant on the morning of the 15th, the merchant received it on the 18th, but on the 20th they said the product had been used and no refund was available. It clearly stated there was 15 days for free return and refund, then today, the 26th, I clicked to confirm the return with the Shopee customer service this afternoon, but I couldn't file a new appeal even though it was clearly not my order. So be cautious when buying things on Shopee.

It clearly stated there was 15 days for free return and refund, then today, the 26th, I clicked to confirm the return with the Shopee customer service this afternoon, but I couldn't file a new appeal even though it was clearly not my order. So be cautious when buying things on Shopee.

Review: I used to like Shopee as it finally made online shopping popular like in other countries many years ago. Unfortunately it's getting more and more unreliable! I'm only buer there. Review:
Dear All,

I just got scammed by the seller / delivery guy in the following way:

I ordered tyre valve caps and there was a delay in delivery with the delivery guy stating I asked for a different delivery date on the updates which I did not.

Then the delivery guy calls me and says that he misplaced my item and now has found it but could I click as received so that he won't get into trouble for the late delivery and he will deliver the item tomorrow.

I didn't want him to get into trouble so I obliged. The next day when the item was delivered, what I got was 2 light bulbs and not 4 tyre valve caps.

Since I had already clicked to release payment it would be futile to complain to Shopee and the valve caps were only RM8.

Moral of the story is never click "received" until you open and check the item no matter what sob story the delivery guy says!

Iâ€™m really thankful and lucky that Iâ€™ve had a positive experience so far using Shopee.com.my
Iâ€™ve never been a seller on Shopee so this is from a customerâ€™s point of view.

Vendors encompass three types:â€¨1. Shopee Mall sellers, 2. Shopee Preferred Sellers and 3. [the regular] sellers

Most times you wouldnâ€™t be â€˜talkingâ€™ to vendors. Youâ€™ll be pinged that your order has been packed and registered under [courier]. You get the item and thatâ€™s it. There are some that take pictures of your order right before shipping out. Automated responses rustles my jimmies, and Iâ€™m glad I donâ€™t encounter them often. 
And with those situations where issues with my order has arisen, most have been cordial, prompt and straightforward with communicating to me that my order cannot be fulfilled. â€˜Worstâ€™ case scenario is a sudden cancellation of my order. And Iâ€™ve gotten my money refunded. 

QOL
Shopee itself has added QOL aspects, which is why Iâ€™ve bumped this up to 3 stars. Just as of last year (?) theyâ€™ve extended the time frame to make reviews, and have now allowed follow-up reviews (this is especially great for those whoâ€™ve bought skincare - which requires months of use before you can see some results) 
Another feature thatâ€™s finally added is the individual product listing review. Shopee used to force customers to review in batches, bought a bunch of stuff from one shop? Youâ€™re gonna have to review all those things in one go. 

Shipping service - SPX Express
Shopee couriers that visit my area have been satisfactory. Parcel tracking is updated and the couriers have been sure to send me a message when my parcel has been delivered.
Maybe Iâ€™ve been a saint in my past life but Iâ€™d say Iâ€™ve gotten majority of my items ordered delivered in good condition and delivery speed has been most satisfactory. (Within the acceptable timeframes from where itâ€™s being shipped and all that)

App vs website experience
With the occasional hanging of the app and when on the website, it did take a few refreshes to be normal again. I wish that the wishlist or liked items were accessible from the website, and not just the app. This is another QOL feature Iâ€™d like to have.

Shopee reviews

Rarely am I informed enough unless I really dig through the reviews for some semblance of a proper assessment. â€¨People stick to uploading random videos and pictures, spamming â€˜mantapâ€™ or â€˜terbaikâ€™ just to receive the 5 coin incentive when making a review. Or I get bad reviews with full 5 stars. 

Shopee used to allow ratings for overall service (this includes products, seller service AND courier service), but now Shopee lets you rate them individually (Thank fk)

Review:
SHOPEE collected the money for my order (THB 4451 for 3 solar-powered wifi cameras) and sent me a package containing a can of liquid (worthless).

When I filed a complaint proving the fraud (video and photo of the opening of the package), the after-sales service refused a refund and chose to reship a second package.

I contacted the shipping company before delivery to find out the size of the second package (because normally the package must be large since it contains 3 cameras).

After checking, the shipping company confirmed that the second package was abnormally small and seemed to contain liquid.

I refused the second package and contacted SHOPEE after-sales service again to request an immediate refund.

No goods corresponding to my order were ever delivered. NO REFUND.

SHOPEE is a company that steals and defrauds its customers.

Never order from SHOPEE which is not a serious company.

Review:
Ordered some frozen food on the 8th. Supposed to have been delivered on the 11th, but since SPX is so incompetent, they couldn't make it in time and had to postpone to next day. The items were stored without proper cold storage and currently it's the hot season. The items arrived on the 12th, warm to the touch, with a funny smell. So I thought, "okay, I'll just keep them in the freezer then try them to confirm whether they're actually spoiled". 

Fried them and they were, indeed, spoiled. Asked for a refund ; shopee rejected it, saying they had the right to try and make 3 deliveries before they could be held responsible. Also gave me the stupid excuse that since the items were "already cooked", that meant I conceded that I received the items in good condition. Reported to KPDN and they somehow fooled the investigator with all sorts of lies. Then again, can't expect much from government agencies these days. I'm not even going to bother taking this to the Consumer's Tribunal for that amount.

Everything they do, they do it half-heartedly or even in bad faith. This was the last straw, and I'm shifting to another e-commerce platform. Hope you choke on my money, shopee.

Review: I was flagged by shopeepay for verification. According to Jeremy Jaime, their person to handle DTI complaints, is that it is that the  bangko sentral initiates verification and not them which is very questionable. First my cash ins are measly ammount 2k to 3k and all disbursed to paying orders made through shopee. Second I am not a financial institution and the BSP's jurisdiction are bank regulations. Even with anti money laundering checks I was only cashing in for 2k and 3k and disbursed through order payments. The reason for this is so that they could get your BANK DETAILS during the verification process. I stood my ground and never gave it until they told me you can give your GCASH details. Now I have left shopee altogetther. Even GCASH has not asked me for bank details and it is a more robust E-wallet then shopeepay. SO be careful, do not give your bank details as it is your right to not divulge your bank details.

Review:
Many people in Malaysia have had unfortunate experiences with Shopee, a popular online shopping platform. Despite being a loyal customer for a long time, I faced a series of issues with their service.

Every time I placed an order and it was supposed to be delivered, I received either a call or a picture from the delivery person. However, during my last order, neither a delivery picture was sent to me nor did I receive the item. This raised my suspicion. I decided to investigate by first reaching out to my condominium's security personnel, who confirmed receiving the order, and Shopee's order status also indicated that the product had been delivered. 

To get to the bottom of the matter, I documented the delivery timing and dates. I even went a step further and reviewed the CCTV footage, which revealed that no delivery person had ever arrived at my location. 

Frustrated, I engaged in a live chat with a Shopee agent to report this issue. The agent assured me that they would investigate the matter. However, after waiting for 2 to 3 days with no messages or calls from Shopee customer care, I once again initiated a live chat with a different agent to explain the situation. This time, they promised to refund my amount within 3 to 4 days.

However, my frustration only grew when I checked the status today and found that it indicated my order had been delivered, with no refund allocated to me. This prompted me to contact another live agent, Ms. Alia, who claimed that the order had been delivered and inspected by their Shopee team, suggesting I should check on my end.

I was convinced that the delivery had occurred elsewhere, as the evidence I had gathered did not match the supposed delivery location. Despite my efforts, neither the seller nor the Shopee agent helped me connect with the delivery person. Even when I informed them that I had reviewed the CCTV footage, they remained unresponsive.

My frustration with Shopee stems from the fact that they don't offer a cash-on-delivery (COD) option. When you don't receive your order, Shopee offers little to no assistance. This raises questions about trust and reliability when ordering from online apps like Shopee, especially when they fail to support their customers.

I find it difficult to trust Shopee and consider placing an order again, given the potential for a repeat of this unpleasant experience. Additionally, I don't have the time or patience to engage in another time-consuming live chat when it is evident that Shopee's support is lacking.

Therefore, I urge fellow viewers not to order from Shopee and kindly share recommendations for good and trustworthy online apps in Malaysia in the comments section. Thank you for your attention and support.

Review:
Awful experience: Shopee Express does not care to deliver the item on time; it's not the first time. The delivery system is poor because it doesn't distinguish between the perishable item and others and deals all with the same frame time, and when chated with the service agent to suggest optimizing the delivery system didn't accept my suggestion and asked me to commit to frame time up to more than one week for a perishable item!
Update: they seem to have optimized the delivery system but still contract with the crazy express shopping companies...I bought the item from China, and after being stuck in with delivery hub for six days, returned the item because it was damaged!
They don't admit the fault rather than compensate the buyer.

This time The parcel arrived at the delivery hub two days ago, then instead of delivering it to me, Shopee Xpress returned to Balakong in Selangor! Why?!! I am in Perak state, not Selangor. What a stupid thing the Shoppee Express is doing... I am seriously considering moving to Lazada.

Review:
I waited for my parcel to be delivered yesterday since the estimated delivery date was yesterday. When I went and look for the status of my package it showed me that my package will be returning back to the seller. The rider tagged it as UNSUCCESSFULLY DELIVERED BECAUSE I PINNED AN INCORRECT ADDRESS. 

HOW PATHETIC IS IT RIGHT!? I HAVE PREVIOUS ORDERS WITH THE SAME ADDRESS OF DELIVERY BUT ALL THE ITEMS HAS BEEN DELIVERED. 

Another thing is that I chat with their customer service and funny HOW MY QUESTION WAS NOT ANSWERED! 

All the three Chat agents did not do what needs to be done. Yes, they all reported the rider, BUT what good would that do to me? 

First agent, reported the rider but did not answer the question IF MY PARCEL CAN STILL BE DELIVERED. 
Second agent, asked for a couple of minutes because she will check it FURTHER. THEN DIDN'T CHECK AT ALL, PROVIDED ME FALSE HOPE. SHE WILL NOT BE AWARE THAT MY PACKAGE WILL BE RETURNED BACK TO THE SELLER,OH! I THOUGHT YOU CHECKED IT FURTHER ALREADY? 

I WAS CHATTING WITH FOR ALMOST THREE HOURS. 

I HAVE USED A VOUCHER FOR THE ORDER AND I WAS ASKING FOR THEM TO SOMEHOW COMPENSATE ME BECAUSE I WAS INCONVENIENCED AND THE VOUCHER WAS USED TO THAT ORDER.

SECOND AGENT, DISREGARDED WHAT I WAS ASKING AND THEN ENDED THE CHAT. GREAT!

THIRD AGENT, PROMISED ME THAT SHE WILL REPORT THE PREVIOUS AGENTS, PROMISED ME THAT SHE WILL EMAIL ME ABOUT THE CREDIT I WAS ASKING ON ABOUT 19:00 YESTERDAY. GUESS WHAT!???? 

SHE DID EMAIL ME BUT NONE OF THE BODY OF THE EMAIL WAS ABOUT THE PROMISED INFORMATION. 

FUNNY HOW A BIG COMPANY RUNS LIKE THIS. VERY FUNNY.

Review: I bought a Fiido M1 pro last week from Shoppee and delivered by Goodbike Khon Kaen.  After receiving and using the bicycle, the battery appeared to be damaged from the battery compartment due to a sharp screw that is attached to the rubber cover that protrudes far into the battery compartment.  I reported this to Shoppee and posted a negative review.  They would exchange the battery if I wrote a positive review.  I edited my previous review, and then Shoppee notified me to return the battery.  Because I use the bike every day, I asked for a new battery to be exchanged.  They didn't, I had to send it.  I couldn't change my review, corrected to "good", after that.  In the meantime I have had the sharp screw replaced at an E-bike shop in the area at my own expense.  I now have a damaged battery that should not be exchanged but returned.  I don't want that, I want to receive a new battery, hence my request to you.  Shoppee and Goodbike Khon Kaen are not responding to my request.

Review:

Shopee rejected my requests twice saying that the delivery is still active. Been waiting for more than 3 weeks for a domestic package to arrive and you think is acceptable? 

You don't even have the courtesy to ask if I could accept the delay and no estimated new delivery date given, no apologies...you just simply cancel my refund requests to protect your own interests. 

Honestly, I don't really care about the small refund anymore but Iâ€™m more disappointed with the way you handle the issue. Very unprofessional. The reason I accepted the delivery at the end because your unreliable delivery team just left the parcel at the guard house WITHOUT calling me first...and I know if I were to reject the package after more than 3 weeks it would be pointless and just a waste of time because neither your Agent or Dispute Team would ever listen! 

Go google Shopee reviews and all you can find are bad reviews!

Review:
Incredibly terrible experience. 
March 2022 I have placed numerous order when I first created my Shopee account to bring them as souvenirs to my overseas friends. All payment has been made in full and yet all the orders were ridiculously cancelled after a week. I have approached the customer service with excruciatingly slow revert and at the end, my problems were not resolved. Instead, I have to rely on my friends to buy them for me. No orders could be placed until the technical problem is resolved. Bravo! Bravo! The worst service ever. 

I do hope Shopee competitor come in and give them some pressure as their service is appalling beyond description

Review:
If I was writing 1 year ago I would give 5 Stars but in 2022, I don't think so anymore and here's why.

There are few things that I dislike after their updates in 2022, which covers customer support, experience using the app itself and their benefits.

Im going to write for both as a Buyer and also Seller because I do both.

Buyer side:
1) They used to give bunch of vouchers (Which they still do) however they've reduced their subsidies (BY ALOT!) you cannot use 2 platform vouchers anymore today, meaning either you choose FREE SHIPPING / CASHBACK.

PLUS

You cannot use both at the same time like it used to and FREE Shipping is only now RM 3 subsidize where it used to be 6-7 few years ago before they dropped to RM 4.90 and now it's RM 3...

I could understand why they are doing this tho because as a seller they really do pay alot of fees to Shopee for these added services(Which I will get back to later).  However it sucks as a buyer.

2)Customer support is utter useless if you have a problem like if you want to change courier or change address (things related to your order)

Well here's how it will go down:

Customer support are going to greet you and asking for your name and email (so they could follow up, USUALLY take days or weeks!)

And then most likely will ask for your Order ID and once provided to them they will check the issue and say there's nothing that they can do and will send to their person incharge and follow up with you again soonest and gives you a due date like 3-5 days (Not including weekends and public holidays...)

WHICH THEY NEVER COULD CHANGE ANYTHING IN THE END AND YOU WILL NEED TO COMPLAIN AGAIN AND THEY WILL SAY YOUR CASE WILL BE EXPEDITED...

But hey...you no longer need them in the end because with the time that they took to *SOLVE YOUR ISSUE*  your parcel may already be delivered to you by then so there's no point (Eventho it took 2 weeks time).

PLUS as a buyer even if you told them it's ok for you to collect at their warehouse, they wouldn't allow it and worse thing is they don't allow us (THE BUYER) to pick our own courier(By the way Shopee if you are reading this ShopeeXpress is the worse courier and should burn to the ground, usually takes 10-20 days to ship successfully and will well don't take my word for it check most of their hubs on Google, usually only 1 star review)...

Long story short, Shopee likes to throw problems left and right / cannot solve anything.

3) This is simple, the APP sucks and lags all the time...sometimes the search engine fails you and 1 second you could find your product and the next second eventho you typed the same thing there will be 0 results...

Even if you have iPhone 13PRO MAX Whatever the latest and greatest it will lag (I have 500mbps wifi btw),

The buttons on the app are no sensitive as it after clicked nothing happens and sometimes i thought it was my wifi or phone issue but seems like many people has this issue too.

These are what I felt as a Buyer,
Well now as a Seller...
Pretty much the same...

1)Their customer service is beyong useless!
They will only forward the issue to person incharge and cannot solve your problem.

Once upon a time Shopee had given sellers a form to fill up so if you would like to opt out or change to a different courier you could do so...which I did..

And everything was fine, I opt out of ShopeeXpress and change to Poslaju + J&T Express..they are decent and sometimes very good compared to others based on my experience...im from KL..

And recently Shopee auto set 90% of my parcels to ShopeeXpress again and when I asked them why is it like that they just told me that because there are too many orders and other couriers cannot handle the parcels so they needed to open ShopeeXpress to help ship them out...(Without Permission)

Now let me explain something, my parcels are kept in the warehouse and production will fill the orders and parcels and place them there on the desk, then pickup will come to my warehouse everyday to pickup...one day there were tens of parcels left there on the desk and pickup told me that because we don't collect from this courier, and that made me realised that I started receiving ShopeeXpress again...it's troublesome because we do not have the time to go to post office everyday to post out ShopeeXpress parcels which is the main reason why I chose to opt out from this courier (That also usually takes 10-20 days to ship successfully)

And customer support will only say sorry and sent me  the same form that I've filled up before...I wish I can show photos here but I cannot attach...I've literally filled the forms more than 5-6 times

And not only that when asked to change they will ask us to send documents and justify reasons why we don't want to use it..after that there may be chances that they will reject too..

I wanted to write more really but this is the maximum length so...it will end here

Review:
When you purchased something and the quality is not parallel with the price nor the quality is up to what the Sellers have claimed, you will write a review with honesty to let others aware of the product before they make any purchases on that specific product. Isn't that what reviews for?

Trust me, Shopee allows the Seller 'hide' that particular review. 

Recently, I bought a towel costs RM49 from a shop named : Happyleader (happyleader3667)

That quality of the towel was terrible, the fabric isn't thick at all. Feels cheap and sheds. I was so disappointed, I rated 2 stars on the product and gave an honest review together with photo and a video proving how low quality of a towel that costs RM49!!!

MY REVIEW WAS DECENT BUT TRUTHFUL BECAUSE I DID NOT WANT ANYONE TO BE SCAMMED BY THIS 'CULPRITS'. 

On the same day, the Seller rated me 1 star and 'hide' my review!!!

I reported the issue to Shopee Management and unsurprisingly, no updates nor actions taken by Shopee.

KINDLY DO NOT DEAL WITH THIS SELLER AT ALL COSTS AS YOU WILL BE WASTING YOUR MONEY. 

For me, when Shopee allows sellers to 'hide' honest reviews, not only showing they are unprofessional as they can't accept criticism positively but they are also a scam who fooled others into investing money onto their business. 

THIS IS HOW SHOPEE WORKS AND MAINTAINED THEIR ORGANISATIONS.

They are happily making money by fooling people and for us, the customers, we are losing money as we ending up receiving crappy products.

SHOPEE IS A FRAUD AND WE SHOULD BOYCOTT!

3) Online82 (On82@MY)

6) Cotton Mill

Review:
I have been using shopee for a while and I am quite experienced to avoid buying bad quality products from bad sellers. In fact, I do enjoy and feel satisfied with my online shopping on this particular online flatform. Thing changed until very recently. 
Shopee offers its customers several buit-in-app mini games. In order to increase customer's interaction with the games, shopee claims to prize those who meet challenges in the game. One of the challenges I have participated recently, which 10 days after the event was over, but they have yet to make public the list of winners, which I do have reason to believe that I am in. I ask for support and clarification from Shopee agent. The 1st agent surely confirmed that because I only won 1 challenge, therefore, I was not on the list. However after I showed them the evidence proving the otherwise, they promise to solve the issue after 2-3 working day. And so far it has been 10 days. And I have been working with 7 different agents. When each agent failed to adress the problem, they repeatedly forward the same message promising to resolve it after 2-3 days. The process seems endless, thus going nowhere.
My real purpose of filing the complaint  is not winning the prize, I just want to see whether their prizes they post are real or just a strategic way to advertise their service. I will update new news.
Btw, the shopee platform I am using is in Vietnam.

Review:
It's all good if you are lucky with your purchases, otherwise you are on your own with the damaged items/ wrong items. Shopee will leave you to deal with the seller. All sellers are defensive and reject your return & refund or offer a few dollars to encourage to keep all the items. 

In the event of return & refund, Shopee allows 3 days including weekend to return the item, otherwise the case is cancelled. As such, if you don't return on Sunday, you are on you own. 

Product rating is managed by seller, sellers are allowed to off your bad product review! When I report it to Shopee customer service (Suganty), she told me to question the seller directly. Seriously?! In this case, new buyer will never get to see genuine feedbacks from buyers. 

Shopee customer service (Suganty) is not helpful and sounds frustrated. 

After all, Shopee is only benefit sellers in order to make ton of money to fund their marketing campaigns such as paying Jackie Chan!

Shopee is not a trustworthy shopping platform. It's unprofessional and a scammer.

Review:
We purchased a PC online thinking that if anything would be wrong with it, we could return it within 7 days which turned out to be one big fat lie. On 06/26/2022 we placed an order and received it on the 
07/06/2022. We set it up and found that the computer would not work when connected with ethernet. We then test it with another cable and still, it would not connect up to the internet. We then tested the same ethernet cables on another 2 other devices and it worked fine.  We then contacted the seller and they said they will have a technician test it remotely the following day. That following day they did and said the device was faulty and should be returned. We then arranged a return/refund with Shopee as we needed to get another computer in the meantime from a local supplier, so already we were out of pocket twice. Shoppe's courier picked it up the following day and it was received by them around a week later. We then contacted them and they said it was under review and they will be in contact with us as to if the computer was faulty or not! (the seller had already admitted it was) We then had to contact the again because nobody had been back in touch and they went on for days. Then they sent us an email saying that nothing was wrong with the computer??? They then told us they had paid the seller. We then complained saying that the device was faulty and had been tested and it was deemed faulty by the seller who was willing to give us a refund once they had the unit back. After a lot of chats online and arguments through email shopee said they could not do anything and that I would have to contact the seller for a refund. Now here is the stupidity of how shopee's policy is. Instead of sending the unit back to the seller they would have to send it back to us to then send it back to the seller, losing time and money and adding extra pollution to the environment. They shipped it back ou and we have just received the unit back yesterday 7/29/2022! We are now sending it back to the buyer and then hopefully we will get a refund! Shoppe really has no idea about customer retention and is blind to how to run a trustworthy business. I know why they have done this, its so they get their commission on the sale instead of being honest, owning up, paying up, and getting more future business from what was once a Gold rating client!

Review: I placed an order with Shopee Supermarket two weeks ago, after which the package circled at the J&T Subang hub for 5 days without getting delivered. So on the 19th, I filed a refund request in an effort to expedite delivery. However, to my shock, on July 21st, J&T sent me a Whatsapp message informing me that the parcel had been lost and instructed that I file a claim from Shopee. Of course I had to reply to that text and I asked J&T how did the parcel end up getting lost, since it was just scanned YESTERDAY 20th July. And J&T's curt and rude reply to me was, "you just ask for refund from seller". So I had no choice but to resort to Shopee. In the app, the case review was set to provide a resolution in 2 days, and yet Shopee's response to me was that they have to investigate, and that investigation could take 5-7 days. I don't understand why you have to put me on hold like this, with no response, no accountability, no explanation. My package is lost, and I am still being charged on my SpayLater. I have not received a single response from Shopee since July 22nd, and it is now July 24th. This is beyond unacceptable and I am beyond furious.

Review:
I should give 0 stars.

Having lived many years in the Philippines: order through shopee ftom China, delivery in 5 to 7 days. Ordering through shopee within Philippines, 24 hours to max 3 days. 3 days if from. Mindanao to a small village in the middle of nowhere in Benguet.

Coming to KK.
Packages take 2+ weeks from KL to Kk. I'm not even talking about a remote village but KK!! 2km from the airport where all packages arrive!

Out for delivery
Out for delivery
......
For 9 days!!!! We must stay home 9 days, starve to death or what?

I lost 3kg waiting for shopee delivery because shopee dictates to stay at home.


Other packages the same, I'm talking not one but many packages. Status not updated or non-stop out for delivery but never delivered.

Air transfer, last update june 27 air transport from KL en-route to KK.
Delivery should be until June 30.

It's now 4 July and it's still en-route in the airplane between KK and KL.

Seriously shopee Malaysia is terrible!!! Why can the shopee Filipinos team do it properly?

I should also note, if in Philippines it says:"free shipping" it is. And you constantly get vouchers so shipping costs usually, nothing, free shipping as promised and advertised.

In Malaysia, out of 24 orders I made, 0 free shipping although every day shopee Malaysia keeps bombarding me with free shipping.

Talking about scam. I thought in Islam lying is strictly forbidden?? Makes me wonder. Hmmm

Customer service is useless. If you file for refund because you didn't receive the parcel, they just reject. You file again, again reject. So money is gone, no product. That's how shopee Malaysia operates.

Lying, deceiving, scamming, stealing money.. After my experience in the Philippines I had 100% trust in Shopee.

Now I know - shopee in Malaysia 0% trust.

Review:
I have been a Shopee buyer for years now. Most transactions are good / unremarkable. But when time comes that I need some help from customer service, it always turns into nightmare. Example 1: I got a big refund because an expensive item was out of stock. The money turned into credit for ShopeePay. I was however unable to spend it because Shopee kept telling me I had overdraw my limit (*of which their customer service confirmed I wasn't but they had no idea how to fix). I wanted to withdraw it back to my bank account (which was the same account I used for payment in the first place) but they said I couldn't do due to some technical issue. In the end I was forced to open a new bank account (and all the hassle associated) just to withdraw the refund back. So they have no problem taking my money from my bank but suddenly everything went wrong at the time I want my money back. Almost a week of forth and back and I realized Shopee customer service are mostly as clueless as the customer they were meant to serve. Example 2: Shopee used their own delivery service (Shopee Express) sometimes and their service is subpar compared to dedicated "real" delivery company. I was informed that one of my package was delivered to me (with my name listed as recipient) one day but I didn't receive anything that day. I went to Shopee Express website to check but I could only find a telephone number with automated response that told me to go back to the Shopee app to check (which by all means is pointless). I filed for a refund request as instructed by the app, but rejected 3 days later without asking me for any detail or providing me with any reasoning or proof of delivery. I immediately filed for refund again but it was rejected in less than 24 hrs. Again, not explanations or proof of delivery was given. In short, I was screwed.

My lesson to you is: do not invest too much into Shopee Malaysia. Only do business with them with small and inexpensive item that you can afford to lose as they are not the kind of company that will give you adequate protection or help. Avoid them as much as you can.

Review:
The Customer Service of the call center is courteous but helpful in no way. What is the purpose of having a helpdesk for parcel updates if all they do is relay the update status, as in Shopee apps? My package has been in the warehouse for days without an update on the apps, are you serious? And all they can say is "if the arrival date has already been overestimated, simply request a refund." Imagine taking more than 1 week to deliver a parcel from Selangor to Selangor. 

What is the point of having a courier service if you waste the time and energy of your employees and your customers? If you wish to compel your customer to use your service, we have no objections, but please do a better job. What is the point of paying so many actors to promote your platform if your system is so disorganized and out-of-date?

People are simply complaining about your "express" parcel service, as evidenced by numerous online reviews. I suppose my opinion is not particularly pertinent, but I am certain that this is the last time I will use Shopee Express. All dissatisfied customers' ratings were changed to a five-star rating in the Tracking More, which is reprehensible. It is beneath contemptible not to acknowledge your company's shortcomings.

At the very least, Shopee Express isn't lying when they say they're "express" - in making customers lose faith in their service. Good job Shopee!

Imagine taking more than 1 week to deliver a parcel from Selangor to Selangor. 

What is the point of having a courier service if you waste the time and energy of your employees and your customers? If you wish to compel your customer to use your service, we have no objections, but please do a better job. What is the point of paying so many actors to promote your platform if your system is so disorganized and out-of-date?

People are simply complaining about your "express" parcel service, as evidenced by numerous online reviews. I suppose my opinion is not particularly pertinent, but I am certain that this is the last time I will use Shopee Express. Review:
I have been ordering from Shopee MY for a while now. I've made a ton of orders to date from a few sellers, at first it was smooth but after a while, I started getting these errors where my account gets suspended for suspicious activity. 
The first time it happened, I got worried and contacted support, they transferred me from agent to agent and finally, after 4 days my account got reinstated.
About 3 weeks later, the same thing happened again but this time it only took a day to get reinstated.
Now, about a month later, it happened AGAIN!

This time, after my account got reinstated, my payment method got rejected. I have been using the same payment method for months with no issue. Suddenly they say my payment method not accepted?!?!

Naturally, I emailed them... BUT it has been an entire week and they never replied. I have sent a follow-up email to no avail as well!

I decided to open a live chat request and guess what? I addressed my issues and the agent told me she will look into it, a few minutes later, she ASKED ME AGAIN WHAT THE ISSUE WAS!
Excuse me?

But never mind that, I explained my issue again and the agent once again said to give her 3-5 minutes to look into it.

Guess what happens next...

THE LIVE CHAT GOT CLOSED DUE TO INACTIVITY AND I HAVE TO QUEUE FOR A NEW LIVE CHAT!!!


The new live chat DID THE EXACT SAME THING but thankfully, I learnt from my first mistake to trust their support so whenever the agent wanted to idle, I will send a message so the chat will not close. Luckily I did that because the support agent literally did not reply for 10 WHOLE MINUTES


In the end, the agent just said she will "FORWARD THE ISSUE TO RELEVANT TEAM"

WHAT THE F******

Review:
Shopee do not let you write a review when you receive damaged/second hand sold as new goods. You must actually 'accept' the order before you can write a review. That is about the most dishonest thing possible.

A seller sent us an opened computer graphics card, with literally holes in the static bag, and unsealed items. 

And we have no way to warn other sellers. Completely dishonest way to run a business. This means you never actually get a good view on the reliability of the seller. Completely undermining a big part of the value of an online marketplace. 

Pick your sellers wisely, can't trust the reviews. If Shopee are able to explain how to write a review for a seller sending you second hand goods, then I will happily remove this review here. But so far, I can't figure out ANYWAY to review this seller.

Review:
I had to activate Shopee wallet because of a cancelled product, so I just put in an incorrect name & some random 4 digit numbers as IC as these information were warranted. Almost immediately, I was harrassed by scammers claiming that I owe someone some money. I never purchased anything using installments except for my car & house. The scammers messaged & called relentlessly, up to a point that they threatened to come to the house. How I knew it was Shopee? The name the scammers used was the exact name which I put into Shopee activation wallet. When my husband got to report it & some authority called Shopee about asking consumers to put in our IC, Shopee flatly denied that they asked for it.
And the most of the sellers there are rude too, I saw them arguing with their customers up to a point belittling their paid customers. In short, many mentally disturbed people within Shopee.

Review:
Placed an order on Shoppe Malaysia. Unpleasant experience, linked up with Shopee CS hoping they can help. Two times of raising Return/Refund appeal only to receive 2 times email that says the return is not justified and the request is rejected. No explanation is given, because decision from Shopee is final. HAHA. There is also a link that asked me to rate their service, guess what, it goes to a blank page.

Seller: Naso_Mall

1. Placed order on a beauty product, asked the seller what lot is it she says 18U909, expires year 2024, says can use with ease (HAHA), and so I placed the order. Goods came, it is lot 18T400, expires 2023, 1 year short. 

2. Seller wants order, says that order will be shipped out the next day. 3 days later I do not see goods. Asked the seller then she quickly arranged for despatch, and the logistical arrangement iupdate then appear in Shopee. Next day I received the goods.

   The seller said it is due to flood (strangely the flood subsided immediately when I alerted her of logistical failure?), and the reply was VERY RUDE: 

   "Do you think I made up the heavy rain and flood disaster"

   "Hello, I ask you, we have stock. Why dont we deliver it to you?"

   "If you can pay, we will send it to you immediately, which will be the effect we very much hope to achieve"

Thanks GOD it is a product less than RM 100.

I have cancelled my Shopee account. There are many places I can place order.

Good luck to those who still want to stick with Shopee Malaysia.

Review:
My first two experiences with Shopee went so smoothly I said why not to the third without hesitation. Shopee must not have heard of "the third times a charm", or decided to flip it on it's head and create a negative experience.

My third order gets placed and is shipped out after 2 days. Same-day delivery is attempted. Wow...that was fast. 

They sent the package with a service that cannot speak a word of English. I'm saying "Hello", "Is this Shopee?", "My order?" and all the person is saying is "Halloooo?" repeatedly, and then saying something in Thai I cannot understand. After this happens 4 or 5 times, and I try to call them in the interim suspecting it's my order, I get a text message that I refused the package.

The seller is USELESS, "please talk to Shopee" is all I can get out of them, every other message goes ignored. 

Try to speak with Shopee, oh look...our English resource is out. They then leave me a cumbersome set of instructions, only half of which I'm able to complete before I get "thanks for submitting your information", and am disconnected from the agent.

Half the site, including many screens with instructions, are in Thai without any way to translate them but the app is supposed to be in "English". I have never seen a worst language translation in an app in my life. Then again, most every app I've interacted with in Thailand is like this. 

Let's be clear. I have over 20 years combined experience with eBay, Amazon, DHGate and Aliexpress. This is by far the worst shopping experience yet, made worse by a site that pretends to extend their shopping experience to foreigners, only to have the effort be a pitiful failure.

Review:
Part 2 - Do NOT buy from SHOPEE.  If you decide to do so, be aware of a seller named iwen2020 who has set up shop and offers over 900 products on the platform only about 4 months.  The seller offers brand named products then attempts to replace with a knock off brand.  When cancelling an order, they will will not accept cancellation requests.   I am working with Shopee Seller management to ensure the seller cannot do this to anyone else.  

Shopee cobbles a seller network together in an Alibaba or Lazada fashion but operates in a far inferior fashion taking no responsibility or accountability for seller behavior.  

I placed my 1st order and paid for it via mobile banking.  More on the banking part below.  The seller sent a chat message offering a "knockoff" of the brand name product ordered.  When I told them I wanted only the name brand, they went silent.  Now I'm unable to cancel the order.  They have ultimate authority on honoring it.     

It gets better.  I contacted customer service and spoke to a helpful rep who said she'd send me directions for my refund stating it would be 2-5 business days.  The email specifically requested me to provide my bank account name and account number in HANDWRITTEN form.  Not going to happen and I'm waiting for alternative instructions.    

The website is poorly designed and difficult to navigate.  FAQs are horrific.  The ordering protocols are unclear and poorly designed.  Easily among the worst eCommerce sites I've ever seen.  

I will return to this review with retails of the refund once they complete.  I want to be sure my experience is fully documented.

Review:
The problem with a lot of Shopee sellers is that when a buyer gives them a low rating because they received defective products, the seller also gives the buyer a low rating for complaining! Where's the justice in that? 
For a customer, especially those of us who paid in advance, it is a big inconvenience for us knowing that the product we purchased is defective and unusable. The inconvenience is not even on the seller's part because they already got our money! And yet they gave us low scores just because we complained! The sad thing is... Shopee doesn't seem to have a policy that protects buyers from unprofessional sellers like these who take advantage of the Shopee star-rating system to attack honest buyers who complain about their defective products. Shopee seems to be more interested in protecting the sellers, not the buyers.

Review:
Parcel delayed for no reason even it is already at the hub in my area! Yes, shipping might be cheaper, but when you consider the cost of delay that might actually be more expensive than the saving, is it really worth the saving? Especially for the items that are more vulnerable to environments like temperature and shocks? To make matter worse, logistics partners are chosen by the Shopee system, users can't do anything about it. Before that, parcel delivery time is averaged at around 2~3 days for local deliveries with well-known courier partners, even for PosLaju, now is > 4 days with Shopee Express! 
There is a lot of great stuff on the Shopee platform, however, nothing turns out to be good when someone monopolises the market. I will consider Lazada for my next purchases. Shopee might just mess up their logistics, which might not be worth the convenient experience.

Review:
It is very difficult to be a chat support agent in Shopee ph. Shopee always has their standard in giving good services towards their customers. And we agents understand that because it is needed for the company to grow by giving care about their customers. Honestly, we do not have high basic salary each month. We do not have per day basic payment. However, we have performance bonus and extra meal and transpo. allowance. Which is kind of difficult to reach, because if you have absent/lates you will be automatically disqualified from that incentive. The same as performance bonus, if you failed either chat survey or handling time, you will be also disqualified. 

I like how the management evolved their features and services to their customers. However, they did not even think about agents who are the front liners who provide more of their time with their mad or happy customers. We always managed and still trying to maximized our allocated time to cater 3 chats in the same time. We also do our best to atleast respond within 30 seconds to send a welcome spiel to the customer from the time the 3 chats come in. We also need to secure personalized empathy and resolution to our customers so that we will not be failed in our Quality Score. We need to acknowledge everyday newly updates in our tools. We need to ensure that we have escalated properly the case because a single mistake would lead to invalid escalation and that may result in being sanctioned. 

Chat support is no easy, because you will be handling different concerns in the same time. And usually the customers are very in a hurry, they keep saying, "poor customer service, are you still there?". They did not know that we are doing Multi-task role. As much as we want to inform our customer to extend their patience because we're handling 3 chats, but we are not allowed to inform them. As chat support we are not being divided into different department as for line 1. We cater buyer/seller concerns from General inquiries up to Technical issues concerns. All of those topics, we must familiarize and make sure to check new updates in our tools. And if we need to escalate the case that's the time that we have different department of teams who will handle different cases. 

Everyday, we have spent 10 and half hours in the production floor for about 5 days. We have also irregular type or  flow of breaks. We have break, break lunch, lunch break break and break lunch break. But to tell you the truth those breaks are being eaten by our unfinished cases that we should put right tagging of concern or escalating cases. After our shift ends, we usually extend for about half up to 1 hour to finish our work.

I got home so very tired and being burned out. I feel like giving up, for so much stress that I got from this job. And especially now, it getting worse, we have to cater 4 chats and yet our pay stays the same. The feeling that I have right now, it is way better to work in a production company like soft drinks factory, because every extended hour is being counted as over time, though we have to come to work for 6 days. But the pay is enough for your work. Here in shopee, I must say that they are very insensitive of how they are so blind to not able to see that we are getting tired and less interested in coming to work. I hope that the management will also see our hardships. And also to the customers, they must also extend their patience, because we agents are doing our best to give good services to you. 

I hope and pray that the management will be also seeing our side on how struggle we are to have 4 chats yet no raise with the pay. 

This is the reality. We are also victims here.

When I told them I did not know about the 1hr policy, the customer service person literally send me the link and said now u know like it was the customer fault for being uninformed. Unlike Lazada who offers a refund, Shopee just tells you that they cannot do anything about it after 1hr and expects you to chat with the seller to convince them to cancel like customers do not matter to them and only sellers do. Seller also cannot seem to understand what I am asking them to do and keeps saying they will send it out immediately even after I tell them not to. Also tell me they cannot do anything even though it has not been shipped out yet since it is already verified in the system which they can simply cancel but seems lazy to do so. Seems like Shopee does not really know or communicate with their sellers and expect buyers to do everything themselves.

Review:
I can't seem to write a review about Shopee overall, so I will write it as a comment.
A lot of the products sold on Shopee are basically crap. I have bought so many things, and nothing really works/fits. When I contact customer service, they never really read what I read and seem to just copy and paste some boilerplate responses. You can't even get a refund to your bank account, only through ShopeePay and only if the seller agrees. Some people don't want to use ShopeePay and sellers would never admit they are wrong. Heck, one seller said "Our product is not faulty, it's due to incorrect installation steps bro". Everyone knows how to "install" or rather stick a screen protector and I've been sticking all sorts of screen protectors since 2006....
I can't even begin to say how frustrating it is dealing with Shopee customer service. I ask one question, they say something else. For instance, I once had an update which said "Buyer reschedule". I didn't reschedule any delivery. Instead of answering why this happened, the customer service agent basically just said sorry sorry. As if that's going to help.
Shopee, you seriously need to filter your sellers. Of course, as a customer we can report the seller, but I doubt anything gets done. Furthermore, it's really frustrating to have to complain about EVERY SINGLE PRODUCT you purchase. Additionally, you need to train your customer service agents to actually read what customers write.

Review:
A very bad platform, mainly they sided with the seller. Any dispute the refund takes more than 2 weeks and a lot of their vouchers is mostly cashback form that you have to return to buy their other stuff. The live auctions there is horrible too, full of their own people to mock each other and buyer. They have subcontractor for delivery and will push blame to each other when something goes wrong. (Sellers will probably give excuses like they use subcontractors because of Wuhan Virus and lack of manpower,  "250" reply or no response at all) There is not much aftersale service. Bought some of the affordable stuff and it's alright but some mid to high end stuff of the overseas live auctions is quite bad and the sales tactic there is so terrible that it aren't funny, they're try to keep talk you into buying high value items with crappy service. Why would anyone want to continue to take the risk after receiving products that's not up to expectation is beyond me. The postman sometimes don't read the note,if you ask for contactless delivery to minimise virus risk they'll insist of in person, if you ask for in person delivery they'll sometimes do contactless delivery. One time the delivery person rudely put my parcel "under"the pot outside and the item inside can be easily damaged because I'm sleeping and missed his call. I told him aren't instructions on the note and he say he didn't see. No idea what the note is for if they don't want to read it.
*Update:They probably read comments here, now the delivery is slightly better. But the refund procedure is still disastrous. And careful to buy especially from some "foreign" sellers or overseas live auctions there, even if you buy "high value" items it's a risk when the item have some defects and you want to return/exchange as some can't be reasoned. When they're about to lose an argument, they'll call for their own group of syndicate in their live auctions to argue or brainwash the buyer. You always see the same users in some live auction like they have no life. ðŸ˜…Distasteful, proceed with caution. *

Review:
this is a very seller biased platform. It doesnt matter if you cancelled your order after an hour you ordered, before the seller even packaged the item in question; the final decision is in the seller's hand and shopee help centre is very clear on siding with the seller (sometimes removing negative reviews to make they're site look more positive than lazada etc.).

The seller can delay until the very last minute to cancel your request and there's so little power to the buyer to stop this. It is at your risk to shop at shopee.

Review:

Sometimes free shipping requires using their ShopeePay payment service, rather than a credit card (although this is not indicated). Other times shipping charges just magically appear during checkout. This makes the prices seem cheaper than they really are. 

The combination of vouchers, coins, discounts, and variable shipping fees seems designed to confuse, and possibly deceive.

Review:
Just like many other e-shopping sites. Plenty of products. Bought an earring for my wife from Chow Tai Fook. Item arrived safely with no issues. 

I tried to change the recipient name after purchase, but was informed by seller I had to cancel and place a new order with new delivery details. I did just that and I did get my refund back as well.

Just like in Lazada, there are some dubious sellers, hence some due diligence and caution is needed. If it sounds too good to be true, then avoid those sellers. Always avoid sellers that do not accept payment via Shopee, and asks for transactions outside of the platform. 

Shopee needs to have be more active in verifying legitimate sellers on the platform, and also insist that all monies must be transacted via Shopee, with an escrow account where payment is only release on successful delivery.

Of course, there will be peddlers of fake goods. I would suggest buyers work with Shopee to lodge a report with the authorities to weed out such peddlers.
Translated_Review:
Just like many other e-shopping sites. Plenty of products. Bought an earring for my wife from Chow Tai Fook. Item arrived safely with no issues. 

I tried to change the recipient name after purchase, but was informed by seller I had to cancel and place a new order with new delivery details. I did just that and I did get my refund back as well.

Just like in Lazada, there are some dubious sellers, hence some due diligence and caution is needed. If it sounds too good to be true, then avoid those sellers. Always avoid sellers that do not accept payment via Shopee, and asks for transactions outside of the platform. 

Shopee needs to have be more active in verifying legitimate sellers on the platform, and also insist that all monies must be transacted via Shopee, with an escrow account where payment is only release on successful delivery.

Review:
Cheapskate and fake promos! 11.11 is a disaster for the buyer!!
They spend so much money on advertisements and hiring irrelevant tv characters such as Pua Chu Kang whose tv show ended over 13 years ago, to promote their "Mega Day Sales", even advertising on the front pages of local newspapers. 
Meanwhile, their customer service is non-existent and their promotional vouchers are fake!
One would think that when one receives a RM50 voucher from playing their game for 4 DAYS, one could use it on the day of the sale.
But NO!! Within 1 second at the stroke of midnight, the vouchers became invalid!! They are cheating the consumers with such fake schemes!!
And where is the free shipping??? Right until now, shipping fees are NOT free on Shopee!! 
Best is to boycott Shopee and their crappy, scammy mega sale promotions. You can get most of the stuff on there on Aliexpress and Alibaba anyways, at a much lower price!!

Meanwhile, their customer service is non-existent and their promotional vouchers are fake!
One would think that when one receives a RM50 voucher from playing their game for 4 DAYS, one could use it on the day of the sale.
But NO!! Within 1 second at the stroke of midnight, the vouchers became invalid!! They are cheating the consumers with such fake schemes!!
And where is the free shipping??? Right until now, shipping fees are NOT free on Shopee!! 
Best is to boycott Shopee and their crappy, scammy mega sale promotions. You can get most of the stuff on there on Aliexpress and Alibaba anyways, at a much lower price!!

Review: DON'T BUY from Shopee Malaysia. I bought an auto-darkening welding helmet from Shopee's ORDER ID. 200912J28J5F0S from their supplier pro_hardware_diy / MARIBEST ONESTOP on 12/9/20 AND RECEIVED IT ON 15/9/20. I was busy and had no time to test the welding helmet and tested it on 24/9/20 which to my surprise does not work (no auto-darkening at all). I replaced the CR2032 battery with a new on and still not working. Upon chatting with seller I was asked to "charge boss" and after several clarification seller confirm to charge the battery which is definitely not rechargeable. I asked seller to replace with new welding helmet and seller refused stating already 10 days past. I contacted Shopee's helpdesk, Miss Arfa, who promised to help me and after two emails I was informed by Shopee that seller will not replace it and worst accuse me of damaging the welding lens. This is insulting to me as a long time Shopee customer who has bought many products costing thousands of ringgit and I hardly ever complain of faulty product. Very disappointed and angry with Shopee helpdesk for just relaying seller's accusation that I am a cheat trying to get a replacement. Please do not buy from Shopee as their customer service is just a mouthpiece for their seller instead of helping their customer

Review: I'm very surprised at the bias of negativity towards Shopee and the misunderstandings which show in reviews.  Shopee is a platform with many thousands of sellers.  As in all things, majority are good, but yes, occasionally you may get a bad product and/or bad experience.  Just after we moved to Malaysia, the Covid Pandemic hit, so we have remained at home and have been using Shopee two or three times each week, for household items, small electronic goods, face masks, non perishable food items, coffee, tea, etc etc.  We have made many many orders over the last five months.  Some items have been disappointing, some have been much better than expected, and most have been more or less what we thought would arrive.  We have only returned a couple of items, and Shopee has been fully supportive with full refunds being made.  If you do use Shopee think about what is being displayed, if it sounds too good to be true it probably is, read the item descriptions very clearly, check the ratings, and read them. Shopee Mall and Preferred Sellers will be less risky, as will Local Suppliers.  With overseas suppliers, most of the time we receive what we expect, but occasionally we get surprises.. item too small, too flimsy, or similar.  The Shopee platform and applications are fine, Shopee is fine, but yes, you may get an occasional bad experience, depending on which seller you choose, so try to choose wisely, just be careful about which 'shop' you go into to .... ;]

As in all things, majority are good, but yes, occasionally you may get a bad product and/or bad experience.  Just after we moved to Malaysia, the Covid Pandemic hit, so we have remained at home and have been using Shopee two or three times each week, for household items, small electronic goods, face masks, non perishable food items, coffee, tea, etc etc.  We have made many many orders over the last five months.  Some items have been disappointing, some have been much better than expected, and most have been more or less what we thought would arrive.  We have only returned a couple of items, and Shopee has been fully supportive with full refunds being made.  If you do use Shopee think about what is being displayed, if it sounds too good to be true it probably is, read the item descriptions very clearly, check the ratings, and read them. Shopee Mall and Preferred Sellers will be less risky, as will Local Suppliers.  With overseas suppliers, most of the time we receive what we expect, but occasionally we get surprises.. item too small, too flimsy, or similar.  The Shopee platform and applications are fine, Shopee is fine, but yes, you may get an occasional bad experience, depending on which seller you choose, so try to choose wisely, just be careful about which 'shop' you go into to .... ;]

Review:
Since Shopee started I've purchased many items via their website, I've also used several other platforms for online purchases including the well know sites - Lazada, Aliexpress, DX, Bangood, Taobao, Amazon. Usually for a purchase I will check a couple of sites and for more expensive purchase also use one of the price comparison websites such as iprice or price panda, generally I find the best offering is found on Shopee (I rarely use Taobao as I can't read Chinese). I've had a couple of disputes with sellers on Shopee that have ended up with Shopee customer service - wrong description of items by sellers; I found that when the complaint was clear stated, Shopee was quick to resolve the cases. 

I also find Shopee's website easier to use than most of their competition's - there are things that could be improved such as the chance to update a review after an extended period rather than the 7 day limit.

To end, a lot of the complaints I read regarding online shopping websites seem to be misunderstanding by the buyer, not reading the product descriptions, not being familiar with the complaints procedure, etc.

Since Shopee started I've purchased many items via their website, I've also used several other platforms for online purchases including the well know sites - Lazada, Aliexpress, DX, Bangood, Taobao, Amazon. Usually for a purchase I will check a couple of sites and for more expensive purchase also use one of the price comparison websites such as iprice or price panda, generally I find the best offering is found on Shopee (I rarely use Taobao as I can't read Chinese). I've had a couple of disputes with sellers on Shopee that have ended up with Shopee customer service - wrong description of items by sellers; I found that when the complaint was clear stated, Shopee was quick to resolve the cases. 

I also find Shopee's website easier to use than most of their competition's - there are things that could be improved such as the chance to update a review after an extended period rather than the 7 day limit.

To end, a lot of the complaints I read regarding online shopping websites seem to be misunderstanding by the buyer, not reading the product descriptions, not being familiar with the complaints procedure, etc.

I believe making a payment of 2 days after an order, is very reasonable. You need to extend your window of payment before cancelling an order. As it is, I've already made payments and had to contact each seller to deliver. 2 to 3 days from date of ordering is a bit tight especially for people who do not have online banking. Review:
Buyers are being protected by the Shopee Guaranteed system 24/7 and all the refund request were almost 100% geared towards helping the buyers in receiving the refunds without any form of hassle.

Has Shopee ever or SERIOUSLY considered the downside for the sellers? I took the liberty to open up a seller account with them and lo'behold, the refund can ACTUALLY BE EXPLOITED easily.

How? My fiancee bought a product listed on our selling platform with a personal Shopee account, file a dispute of refund and you know what happened next? On my selling account center, THERE IS NO OPTION to DEAL WITH THIS INCESSANT refunds in a FAIR YET TRANSPARENT manner. 

There is only a "dispute button" followed by counter or acceptance of the refund proposal initiated by the buyers. How is that even a fair e-commerce platform for sellers? Plus if the sellers chose to counter the proposal by paying a sum of money back to the consumer, it would AFFECT the seller's rating which then happen to blacklist them automatically by Shopee's stupid rules that sellers has to abide to.

Sound contradictory and extremely BIAS. Scammers whom are smart enough to detect this loophole can easily gain an upper hand by exploiting this set-up to cheat SELLERS.

How can Shopee be so PROUD of what they offered to the sellers?? Dumbest e-commerce platform ever.

There is only a "dispute button" followed by counter or acceptance of the refund proposal initiated by the buyers. How is that even a fair e-commerce platform for sellers? Review:
I never use any online shopping app with such bad experience.

1. I ordered a wrong type of a product, so I cancel it before seller ship out. And the order 'status' is canceled so I thought my order canceled successfully.
2. One week later I still got the parcel, if I would know this one is the one I canceled, I would just refuse the parcel.
3. I check in Shopee APP to find out what happened then in notification, it said my cancellation is rejected by seller. I ask seller why, no body answer me. I send many messages in two days, no one answer me at all.
4. I request refund, and I am so confused by the refund process. One message told me I need to waiting for the tracking number, another message told me to return my parcel to the POPStation, I tried find out what to do so I contacted service chat. I queued 7 mins to get answer from live agent, but when they ask me to provide my order ID, I only leave the chat for 1 min when I come back our conversation is terminated.
This refund has been annoyed for for few days, I am so angry with this, I promise I won't use shopee forever, I will tell all my friend not to use it.

Review:
Before MCO, the delivery time was good. Now it is extremely bad. I can see the goods sitting at their warehouse for 10 days, and customer service told me to hit the return / refund button, so that someone will attend to delivering my product. Customer service is very bad, will log me out in the middle of a chat, and I have to wait in the q again. Product sits in their warehouse for 10 days even though shipment arrives from China in 4 days!!!

Another problem I encountered is sellers selling fake goods. Seller uses Huawei logo and brand name all over the product page. When I received the product, it turned out to be OEM, fake unbranded. I had to spend RM24 on delivery charges to return the goods. How can Shopee allow fake goods to be sold?

Review: Shopee is great when things go right but when things go wrong, they go spectacularly wrong. As others have mentioned here, there is NO protection for buyers at all. Sellers are allowed to make cancellation of a sale/ ship out items after their dispatch window (@ riraanne81) without notice, but buyers need approval from sellers to cancel their purchases. Shopee customer service is virtually non-existent, and in the chance you get to speak to somebody, it's an automated reply. I won't dismiss Shopee entirely, but beware there is no customer service when things go wrong.
Translated_Review: Shopee is great when things go right but when things go wrong, they go spectacularly wrong. As others have mentioned here, there is NO protection for buyers at all. Sellers are allowed to make cancellation of a sale/ ship out items after their dispatch window (@ riraanne81) without notice, but buyers need approval from sellers to cancel their purchases. Shopee customer service is virtually non-existent, and in the chance you get to speak to somebody, it's an automated reply. I won't dismiss Shopee entirely, but beware there is no customer service when things go wrong.

Review:
Bought face masks from a local seller in March 2020, during MCO (partial lockdown) NOT a pre-order item, just a regular advertisement. Before buying, seller was friendly. After order is confirmed, seller refused all communications. After 2 weeks, I tried to cancel order, seller simply click reject to my request and remained silent. I sought help from shopee customer service. Customer service says he can put it to a return/refund status. I said ok. So the request was put across. After that, seller just click DISPUTE request.

Update 17/4: The dispute has been granted in favour of seller. Shopee email, asked me to wait and it further states that any further requests will not change anything as it is mco.

Update 10/5: I just understood what is happening after reading shopee education (for seller). We expect some late shipments due to mco but I bet we are not prepared to wait for up to 2 months. Shopee auto-allowed ALL sellers to ship out latest by 19/5 for all orders paid before 29/4. This date has been extended according to each mco extension announcement. So for those of us who paid in March... just have to wait 2 months to get our order. Seller can ignore all our messages, reject our cancellation requests...and just ship it out before shopee due date.
Most of their customer service don't know this. All of them have been giving me the wrong information causing extra stress, varied expectations and endless disappointment.

Update 21/5: This morning, order still no change of status. It was supposed to have been cancelled by today. I contacted customer service, then immediately the order is auto cancelled. Money to be refund is a separate issue but I finally got my order cancelled almost 2 months later.

Conclusion: Shopee is not treating buyers fairly. Though there are many good sellers in shopee, policies set up by shopee is clearly inviting lots of irresponsible sellers too.

Review:
Horrible experience as a buyer with Shopee. Seller from China has faultlessly delivered the parcel but due to COVID restrictions, I am unable to receive the parcel in time. I proceeded to ask for a reroute since the item is in Shopee warehouse (ShopeeExpress , not Poslaju or other external couriers). Back and forth email took 2 weeks and asked for a senior officer but customer service rep (Wei Shen) was the only one I am able to be in touch of. Suggestions were slow, unhelpful, unconvincing and discomforting and there are no further updates on my reroute request (last email was sent by me FYI , a few days ago). No further clarification from senior officers were received, and parcel investigation was performed dismissively by Shopee Investigation Team. I will continue to share my experience on other platforms.

Shopee , customers are your stronghold and you are failing your customers here. Do make a stringent review of which staff to keep and which to fire in order to maintain your reputation. You should get your poor performing staffs fired. Maybe we should all choose other companies e.g. Lazada over Shopee.

Review:
Shopee has the worst gaurantee policies for buyers. They ONLY PROTECT their sellers. I have learnt a hard lesson from this painful experience. Don't bother contacting the customer service or the dispute team as they are just real human acting bots. 

I made an impulse purchase not knowing seller has no stock and will have to wait for stock availability then the items can be shipped. Needed the stuffs very urgently as it was a life and death matter. I requested for a refund so I could use the money to purchase the same items elsewhere. It was declined by seller. 

So, I opened a dispute to the customer service to request for a refund quickly. I was promised a refund in 2 days.. but it was NOT TRUE. Shopee extended its so-called Shopee gaurantee for another 5 days. I have no choice but to accept. I have waited for 5 days, in the end Shopee cancelled dispute and i have to wait for another 3 days to file a new dispute again.. and this went never ending, the help from Shopee was simply useless. 

Thank you Shopee, for screwing up peoples' lives by not helping and not keeping your promises to your buyers. All I've gotten was templated same answers for 3 times! There was no sincerity at all. Simply put it, LIARS.

Please think a million times before buying something from this platform, you will be under the mercy of the Sellers when things go wrong and the useless customer service that don't provide any support at all.

Review: A black t shirt with a kayaker was advertised.  I ordered one for my kayaking friend from the picture shown (black with the design). These people are false advertisers and thieves.  Do NOT deal with them.  I wish I had read these reviews before ordering from them.
