Review: You cannot get your money back if seller does not agree to refund, SHOPEE WILL SIDE WITH SELLER ALL THE TIME throughout my shopping experiences. They always say they cannot refund due to QUALITY difference, what I brought is 180 degree different from what I brought. The seller sold the item for RM 60 and now they reduce the price to RM45. The name of the seller is Wute XX .nic , DON'T BUY FROM THIS SELLER. The VR box they sell is actually RM10.9 only, you see how easily he decreased the price to RM45. To be fair the product is RM 60 or now RM45 with the 3D LENS (Which I did not receive) I checked the reviews they say the RM 10.9 version have blurry lens, which is the same with the item I received. The seller did agree to return half of RM50 which I am eligible to receive (I did rather give the money to a beggar in the street than giving it to that SCAMMER). FYI they lowered the price most likely because I initiated refund, there is NO CAMPAIGNS ONGOING for them to LOWER the PRICE. This is NOT the FIRST TIME I get this kind of problem buying from this platform where I buy from them and get inferior/wrong items. Please do take note that just reading ratings only in Shopee does not guarantee you buying a good product because people who are not satisfied with the orders and refunded don't get the chance to rate the products and bad ratings may be removed (tbc) which is not the case in Lazada, you can return and still give ratings. Lazada at least I get my money back and they try to reason with buyers. I gave advice to their staff that I know and either they don't care or they don't have the power to do anything. I think the management is at fault, it was very sad. From what I know the company is founded few years ago and was growing rapidly, they say the company is growing so fast that they failed to adapt to their environment. People are smart, Customer Service and Personalization is very important in the era of globalization, I will take my seat back and look at what the company will become for years to come. GO LAZADA!

Review: Unreliable shipping app as Customer service and dispute team are not very helpful with buyers they are not protecting buyers welfare and interest at all despite numerous chats with the teams. They are encouraging unreliable sellers on this app. Where there is no protection on buyers. I have bought sanitizers from this seller in orchard road which I have ordered 10 and only 1 came.  When you follow up with seller, I was being fooled that the seller going to deliver the balnce 9 bottles to me the next day but in vain. Then I requested for refund as I am being fooled earlier, when I called seller next day, mobile was off. And when I checked with ninja van, they said seller never arrange for collection at all and at that moment,  I know I was fooled....it was a con sales. Then I immediately seek for refund and proposed that seller can deduct this bottle delivered to me and just refund the balance to me. The seller refused and insisted that I need to return the bottle back and claim that the courier will pick up from me the next day which as predicted , next day, no one came ... I was just naive to be fooled again. I raise for dispute request with shopee and even chat with the cs and yet no one can help to get the balance refund to me at $135. Total paid $150-$15 for the bottle I received. Yet the dispute team revert to me to tell me I can only refund if bottle is return by registered mail with tracking status.  I am agitated and can't understand the rationale, why make things difficult that I must do all these at my expense and time and yet nothing has been done to seller based on the irresponsible and cheating attitude. What about the time that I have wasted at home waiting for the delivery and collection?.?? Who is going to pay me ?? That is too ridiculous...instead of helping buyers to address the issues, they let you deal with seller yourself. And if things happened,  buyer will be at mercy to the sellers. I WILL NEVER SHOP AT THIS APP AGAIN FOR ALL THE INCONVENIENCE CAUSE ....NO PROTECTION ON BUYERS AT ALL !!!!!!

Review: The integrity of some sellers in Shopee is a big issue. The sellers will just keep silence and ignore your message when you contacted them to inquire the status of the order. I will try to avoid shopping via Shopee from now on as it's really unfair to a Buyer. When saying unfair, here is the situation happend:- the order cancellation from Buyer must get the approval from the Seller although the product has not been shipped out yet, while the Seller can simply cancel your order few days later by just giving the reason of Out of Stock. In fact, the product was showing available at the time that you placed order, but the order can be cancelled by the Seller simply few days after... In addition, you will find no way to get any support from Shopee as the Shopee Support team will never reply your email when you sent in your query. The Help page is useless and serve no purpose at all.

Review:
Platform for buying things you don't need - order cancellation is very liberal... You cannot expect to get the items you order when shopee cancels the order due to seller not ship out. I don't know whether sellers are even given ample time to prepare and ship out item or not. Maybe weekends are considered into the timeframe as my cancelled orders were all made in weekends. It is quite a hassle to go monitor the status of what you bought until a prolonged period of time then u check your orders and realise order cancelled a few days in. 

Also, one of my cancelled orders that I was very sure it's due to â€œseller not shipped outâ€ is now reflected as â€œnon paymentâ€. How could this be possible when my payment I did make was refunded to me due to order not fulfilled. Non payment is something after the fact. It looks like is changeable to manage the seller's record at the expense of the buyer.

Also, claimed vouchers were not able to be utilized. I guess this is what "limited redemption" means, which is not explained. Only when u experience then u know. Shopper first need to quickly claim a voucher upon its release, and then we cannot expect to use it because there is a second quota to also quickly checkout with it?

It looks like shopee need to clean up the implementation of their operations. Until then the shoppers have to spend more effort to understand how to work around shopee. Coming from someone who has also shopped at Qoo10 and Lazada. Gave 2 stars , one extra star for the wide range of items esp snacks from overseas sellers, and customer service is able to understand my issue and resolve it (slowly but surely). However 2 stars overall is the maximum I can give so far.

Edited to add:
I'm not able to leave rating for orders made a month ago. (On app. Didn't check PC version). So reliable sellers lost favourable ratings like that just cos buyers are not quick enough? 
And so, had the experience been unpleasant, does that mean shoppers who are not quick enough would be unable to leave bad rating?

How could this be possible when my payment I did make was refunded to me due to order not fulfilled. Non payment is something after the fact. It looks like is changeable to manage the seller's record at the expense of the buyer.

Also, claimed vouchers were not able to be utilized. I guess this is what "limited redemption" means, which is not explained. Only when u experience then u know. Shopper first need to quickly claim a voucher upon its release, and then we cannot expect to use it because there is a second quota to also quickly checkout with it?

It looks like shopee need to clean up the implementation of their operations. Until then the shoppers have to spend more effort to understand how to work around shopee. Review: Me and a merchant had a mutual cancellation for an order since I was going to apply a discount voucher I wasn't able to apply before. They were computer parts and, even though the COD option was available, I thought it was safer paying through ShopeePay. When the order was cancelled, Shopee decided to withhold my funds for almost 48 hours now stating that the cancellation is still "processing" my 26,898 PHP. It is very concerning as this is a huge amount of money for me. Especially when all of my cancelled orders before had no problems when it comes to being instantly refunded. I don't know how many times I was refunded for their Piso Game and it was always instantaneous. There are also several facts that aren't matching up. How can it still be processing when the merchant cancelled it. It states on the status of the order that it is a cancelled order and a Refund ID is already given to me with a check status. The refund request was already made on the same date as the cancellation was processed, but it is still not posted to my ShopeePay. Customer service is no help. They can't seem to find my Refund Request ID and I don't know if they're telling the truth about not being able to find that or if there's a glitch on their system. They keep telling me different things as well. One says they don't have any way to complete this "processing" cancellation and I have to wait 24 hours. Another customer service agent told me that the refund was ALREADY POSTED THE DAY IT WAS CANCELLED, but then suddenly retracted it when I told them it wasn't and to wait another 24 - 48 hours after I already waited more than 24 hours. If that isn't fishy I don't know what else is. Also, how am I supposed to get my money back when they say they have no ability to complete the processing cancellation and their system won't ever release the funds? Just keep on telling me to wait 24 hours till their computers hopefully release it on a whim? Don't they have any control over their own website? Ridiculous. This is sounding more like they're stealing or scamming me from my money more than anything, saying that it's just stuck at "processing". I was so excited when my friend recommended me this site, but it's turning out to be a nightmare. My hard earned savings, my blood and sweat for 8 months, and all of my 13th month pay to buy a computer for Christmas as a gift to myself. All gone. They better give me my 26k back or I'm spending more to sue their company.

Bought a 40" Tv from Shopee (Malaysia) which I received "Dead On Arrival", There were many crack lines across the screen.
Immediately informed Shopee's Customers Service many times through LiveChat, emails and phone calls.
So much time, effort and expensive call charges wasted over the past weeks communicating with Shopee's Incompetent Customer Service. Many agents had handled my straight forward case. I have recorded down the customer service agent's names,Syah, Thiveegaa, Nazira, Wani and Nabil. What a nightmare shopping at Shopee.com Malaysia.
Better think twice when buying big electronic items online, especially if it is from Shopee.com Malaysia.

Review:
Just had a bad experience with Shopee Malaysia customer service team and one Shopee seller. 

The issue is app is very inflexible in change of shipping address feature.Shoppers cannot change shipping address in the mobile app once it set to default. Customer has to call customer service to enable the change.

The company has a fixed and stubborn policy such as Shopee has the right to refuse customer request to change the shipping address once the item has been shipped out by the seller. Even, request for refund will be rejected by Shopee to protect the seller who also raise dispute. Tacit collusion practices. Looks like seller will benefit to charge shoppers with penalty shipping fee to resend the product to the correct location. 

Note: Users must quickly cancel the paid orders before order processing, then such refund processing will be allowed.

When customers get frustrated and repeat the request using 'strong' but not foul language, customer service team will terminate the online chat request rudely.

Review: The company itself is a scammer, what with their misleading promotions on "fReE sHipPiNg nO MiN sPeNd" or the big joke that is their coins cashback vouchers. Graying out the vouchers when you go to checkout at the exact moment they become available, or worse, running out THE EXACT SECOND they "become available"--is it even humanly possible to claim these vouchers within 0.1 seconds? This platform is shady as hell. And the honest sellers get caught up in it, because Shopee can't be bothered to do quality and background checks on sellers and products. They let the scammers get away with selling counterfeit products and put it all on you for making the purchase, even when there isn't always a way to check their authenticity. It's ridiculous, because if they were doing their job we shouldn't have to worry about these things. Their customer support is beyond useless, and often come off as half-wits who don't even know how to form coherent sentences because they themselves don't know what the hell they're talking about. They will give you the runaround and they won't even bother trying to hide it. They are incompetent, and most likely don't even get paid minimum wage and just signed up for the job because some recruiter pulled them from the streets. Absolutely abhorrent. I'd give up Shopee if only all the sellers I trust would move to a platform that isn't as useless as this one. I'd sue Shopee if I could.

Review: They promised 12.12 all sellers have a minimum of RM12 free shipping. Then on that day, shopee start changing all your vouchers to RM12 shipping vouchers (even when you have a RM40 ones). But when I tried purchase some items, shipping voucher cannot be applied coz apparently, the voucher cannot be applied to these items. What nonsense is that?!! Then comes to those overseas sellers giving away vouchers to claim. After claiming and have waited in anticipation for 12.12 to arrive and have purchased using vouchers for each sellers, they came back as tell you the vouchers are not for this platform. Some even came right out and lied they are out of stock or item is not in good conditions to be sold, and ask me to cancel and refund. Went on Shopee chat and chatted with Shopee customer service, they couldn't do nothing about it. Just keep in saying sorry for the inconvenience caused. What will happen if you don't cancel? Seller will eventually cancel (buyer cannot dispute) and get penalty by shopee or wait till the shipping out date expired then seller get penalty. All in all, shopee gets all the benefits. We as buyers get nothing in compensation or any goodwill gesture for the trouble we went through. Without us buyers to boost your business, you are just nothing. Might I add.... Customer service is crappy and unprofessional. I am sure if this continue, shopee will sure go downhill

I got scam by the quiapo seller of hard drive....later found out these are the scrap hdd being sold by the scammer online seller in quiapo....i ordered 6 pcs hdd they only send 2 hdd and upon closed inspection this hdd are scrap because parts are desoldered already from pcb..meaning they knew it is bad before they send it...luckily when i saw the package i open it in front of delivery man because package was so small..6 pcs hdd wont fit the package...and i took some pictures with delivery man witnessing the opening of the package.......the seller is  YAMAGO ......so right away i click the refund and message shopee..the next day they approved the refund and put the money on shopee pay(shopee wallet)  ...now its been 12 days past. Review: For a company trying to mimic Amazon's business model, their customer service is the complete opposite. Why would anyone use this app and deal with people that don't care about their customers?

Review:
If there's a 0 in here I would probably choose that. Why? Well you're in for a ride. Stick until in the end and read this excruciating story of mine.

So I want to buy a keyboard specifically the RK61 keyboard. And there's a white and black version of it as well as different switches for the keyboard. Well what I really want the most is the white keyboard with red switches. So I saw one on shopee and decided to place an order for it. There's no COD option (and this is a huge red flag already) so I went ahead and paid using gcash. Oh and the seller is not even responding to my inquiries which is another huge red flag but hey I really wanted the keyboard that badly. So after a day or so the seller messages me that they're out of stock on that specific keyboard (this also happened to another seller this time I bought keycaps). Anyways I asked if I'm alright to change the keyboard. Well it's fine as long as it's not the black version so I asked for the brown switches and white keyboard. They went ahead and they said that they don't have one (oh take note that in their page they have everything in stock). Anyways after another day the seller accepted my cancel request. So I messaged another seller to check if they have the white keyboard with brown switches (since they don't have the red one available) Then they said that they have one. Alright cool I placed my order and a day after they shipped out a BLACK one. I tried cancelling my order but they rejected. Contacted Shopee about this and not even a speck of usefulness. It's like I'm talking to a bot defending they're sellers. In the end I had no choice but to accept the wrong product that I ordered.

Side Note:
The customer service is also really really inconsistent when providing information. One says this but another contradicts it.

Review: Bad system with customer service especially on the sales day. Do no go for big sales where they will take ur money and hold for month(since 11.11, I havent got my refund) before they refund you back. From what I experience, I bought something online, pay them, status will still remain as not pay. I call up customer service after a queue of 300++ user on the line,  they say need to wait for 24 hours. After 24 hours, they cancel my order in the system. I email again regarding my issue, with my bank receipt, they ask for my bank details to refund, however after a week still not settle. When I follow up with them, they say they refund to shopee ewallet which I don't even have one. Given my bad experience with shoppe, I do not wish to give them my personal details in order to register their ewallet. I ask them to transfer. I added my bank account in shoppe, they say they need 24 hours to verify and they will transfer. A week then passed. Still didn't not received refund. I email them and call them up. I ask for their transfer proof, they say they still working on it. Is lies after lies, I am too tired to follow up. I launch a complain to kpdnkk. Is a small amount they hold on, but during sales like this, how much they could earn just on the interest by parking consumers money in one place. I do not trust shoppee anymore, just like lazada. If u really need to buy somethjng from they, suggest to not do it during sales, u have better chance of getting ur order properly done.

Review:
I bought an item from the Shopee Seller called 'yinxen.my'. It was supposed to be delivered by Ninja Van courier on 12 November 2019. The Ninja Van driver put the goods in someone else's mailbox without my permission. Then the Ninja Van driver took a photo of the wrong mailbox to supposedly 'prove' that he had delivered the parcel.

 I sent a photo on my mailbox to Ninja Van and the Shopee Seller yinxen.my, to prove that the driver put the parcel in the wrong mailbox.  After not responding to repeated emails and phone calls, Ninja Van courier finally stated in an email sent to me on 25 November 2019: â€œWe are sorry to inform that the parcel has been lost from our end. Our relevant team will liaise with Shopee to proceed for the next step. You may refer to them for the next step of either refund or to your seller for a replacement.â€

 The Shopee Seller told me, in a chat message on the Shopee site, that they believe me when I say I did not receive the item; however, I have yet to receive a refund or replacement of the goods.  Ninja Van courier will not respond to me by phone or email.  The Shopee site provides absolutely no way for a customer to contact Shopee directly.  As of 3 December 2019, the Shopee Seller 'yinxen.my' has blocked me from sending them chat messages.

 Note that every page on the Shopee site that offers goods for sale states:  â€œShopee Guarantee - Get the items you ordered or get your money backâ€.  Clearly that statement is a lie.

 Neither the Shopee Seller, nor Shopee, nor Ninja Van do business honestly! If you are smart, you will not deal with any of them.

Review:
This is the first time i tried to shop on Shopee website.

I found the Shopee website is unstable, slow and not user-friendly. 
I have to wait for ages for the payment transaction to go through and eventually the website has shown payment transaction did not go through. However, my bank sent me a message stating that the Payment Transaction was successful. This has caused a lot of confusion and hassle as I have to log in the issue I encountered with Shopee customer service to get confirmation on the status of my payment. 
I tried to call their customer service but they were unable to help.

I thought online shopping suppose to save time and make life easier. But in this case, it is more time consuming, stressful and gives me a headache. 

I have shopped at other online shops before, never have I encountered such an issue. I think if Shopee wants to have a greater market share at internet sales, they need to improve their online infrastructure and customer service.

Review:
I made an account with Shopee the day before and tried using the new joiner's voucher but had trouble with it. I contacted customer service and not only was I accused of violating the terms and condition, but was also replied in a very rude way. First off i have no idea how i could've violated anything having owned my account for such a short period of time. After only my first email asking why i couldn't use my voucher, i was replied by such an ill-mannered employee who explicitly said "your account is suspended. The decision is final." and then proceeded to tell me tell me I've violated the Terms and Conditions in the same email and finally deciding to end my query, without me being able to ask any further questions or even send a replying email. 
Abruptly ending queries made by customers shows that they have no interest on working on consumer satisfaction, even when it takes as little effort as sending emails. Also, saying "The decision is final." is so audacious seeing as i was not even going to negotiate on my account being suspended, because why bother? There are tons of online shopping platforms way better than Shopee. 
Why would consumers ever want to support a platform that only cares about the needs of its advertisers and disregards people who actually "funds" their business. I would give zero stars if i could.

Review:
Some month ago i made a account registration at Shopee (takes less than 2 minutes) . I never used it, but suddenly wanted to, hence i tried to make my first shopping. Only to realize that i could not log-in due to (may be) a forgotten password. 

So the website directed me to a reset-password-page and i followed instructions. Only to find out that a sms code that should be send, never arrived.  Tried multiple time, and complained to Shopee. First they send me all kind of totally nonsense emails. Then finally they admitted that they have had IT problems and it should be solved. But it was Never solved, hence i requested my account deleted. 

Now it really started to get crazy. they requested me to make an official letter and send 2 valid ID`s. Things that would take me 1-2 hours to do. It took 2 minutes to open the account, and because they cannot make things work they request people to spend hours for them !!! instead of calling my phone or whatever as they had both email and phone number. 

This is simply the worst internet experience i ever had, and i can not imagine that a company like shopee has any future in business.

Review:
In total, lost RM 300+ for using shopee. Worst in Malaysia.

 Made lots of purchase througout last 6 months. Afew got minor problem but one of it being seller no stock and refunded, however the money never get returned to my bank (2months+) and sent multiple support request to shopee but to no avail. rm155+ gone. please avoid this like plague. (Edit 28th August 2019 TTPM criticized shopee on the fund release policy, and ordered the dealer returned me the money, in which the dealer did on the spot)

Review:
After reading the negative reviews below i can only agree 100% with what is being said about Shopee Thailand. Seems like a pattern of SCAMS with deceptive and unprofessional conduct from this company.

My poor experience was as follows, a seller sent me an item completely different to what was ordered. The item they sent was a small cable and not what I paid for which was a wireless mouse. 

The seller in chat just said â€œwe sent you the correct itemâ€ so itâ€™s your word against theirs. 

Itâ€™s basically a BAIT AND SWITCH scam that many sellers on Shopee seem to be doing and getting away with as Shopee just does not care what the sellers are doing. 

So long as the seller sends you something (does not matter if itâ€™s a box of rocks) the order will be marked as completed by Shopee. You need to understand that once you have paid for an order the deal is done as far as Shopee Thailand is concerned. 

No matter what the â€œsellerâ€ sends you or if you have a problem with item if itâ€™s defective a REFUND IS NOT POSSIBLE from Shopee. They simply donâ€™t care about customers at all, the support and ethics of them is the worst that I have ever seen from an online shopping company.

They are happy to take money from a Farang â€œforeignerâ€, but you cannot get an email reply in English or talk with anyone in English over the phone when you have a problem. They only send generic emails â€œblah, blah, blahâ€ if you make a complaint about an order to just to WASTE YOUR TIME. They do this because they know that most people will just give up.

Personally, I only lost 450 Baht about 15 USD so itâ€™s a LESSON LEARNED, I hope people reading this wonâ€™t make the same mistake I did and use Shopee. A friend of my mentioned in conversation (after I got scammed) that he had a similar problem with a seller and Shopee once again just DID NOT CARE and it was the exact same recipe of inaction like my case. 

The reviewer right below "Bjorn" mentioned that Shopee was only for Thai but according to one of my staff she said that even Thai people are also saying many NEGATIVE THINGS about Shopee too, so whatâ€™s been said in these negative Shopee reviews applies for both Thai and foreigner with Shopee in Thailand.

My advice is DO NOT USE SHOPEE in any way.

Review:
I had a ridiculous dispute situation on shopee.

Seller ran out of stock but instead of contacting me to cancel, it's fairly expensive item, he contacted me & said he has shipped me a gift while I wait for stock for my actual item, and he marked the item as 'shipped out' using the gift item I never asked for. All these are in chat, he practically confessed he already shipped out the 'gift' when he contacted me.

To my utter shock, shopee refused to refund me and cancel my request, ignoring the evidence that so clearly showed seller gamed their system to buy time for himself, locking in a sale giving buyers no choice because he seem to know shopee will be on his side.

I have obtained the emails of the CEO & the MD & emailed them & also contacted them on facebook about the utter ridiculous scenario where a seller can hold a buyer's money hostage just by shipping something not asked for and marking item as shipped out, while buying time to ship real item, no respond from them.

I'll stick to the alternatives. This is the worst case of dispute resolution in my entire online shopping life!

Review:
I saw this really cute poncho for  around RM26 and placed my order. I got a notification saying that my purchase was being processed,  I was really excited and I usually don't mind waiting at all, it could come a few days late and I wouldn't care as long as I receive my item.  Thing is 9 days have passed and I have not received a single notification about the order at all, I thought to myself surely it wouldn't take that long? 

Shortly after that I got a notification saying my order was canceled because the seller failed to ship on time, and my payment would be refunded . I thought it was odd, but that's okay maybe stock ran out, I'll just place another order again, cause my payment was refunded to me and all.

I also contacted the seller after placing my order because Shopee suggested that I do, I didn't receive a reply and I thought, hey that's alright. So, I contacted the seller again, I asked if the poncho was in stock, as my previous order was canceled, if it was I would place a new order. What annoyed me was, the seller was clearly online but they just refused to read my messages. So I decided to just take a look at the poncho again, to my shock the price has gone up from RM26 to RM70.60. I was baffled??? At this point I was just upset and disappointed, I decided to just give up on that poncho, and of course I still have not gotten a single reply from the seller. I get if you don't have stock, I do not mind waiting at all, don't just cancel my order without asking me though? It was a really unpleasant experience.

I understand this isn't Shopees fault but still, that just felt like a huge slap to the face :/ .

Unlike Shopee, if they have an incoming delivery within the day, they will send a text message right before the delivery man arrives. This is really bad for me, as no one is always at my home. I will not be able to leave the payment to the guard on duty, by not knowing that the delivery of my ordered items would be within that day. I hope they will improve this. I have experienced this twice. Since then, I have not ordered in Shopee.

Review: Comparing Shopee with Lazada, Shopee needs a lot of improvement on their service. Firstly, bad sellers all around that does not ship out item in time! It is very hard to chat with them as they are not responsive at all. Secondly, Shopee should have sent emails to customers who just purchased an item from Shopee. We are not notified on where is our parcel as the status update is very slow! Whereas, Lazada takes very quick action, delivery on-time and very responsive towards every order. Shopee needs this! As customers, we need to know on where is our parcel, so the status update should be quicker and more efficient! Also, they need to manage and control the type of sellers. This is serious as sometimes we pay for what we don't get in the end. When want to cancel order, the seller sometimes do not accept. So means, you will not get your refund back!
